items.name_en: Style No.6821- Summer New 🌷MCM🌷 Original Patricia Visetos Mini Saddle Bag. This Patricia shoulder bag is a 🌷MCM🌷 classic, based on the classic Patty style, combining Bauhaus-inspired design and craftsmanship, showcasing 🌷MCM🌷's excellent heritage in making luxury goods. The bag front is decorated with a shiny laurel lock, an ideal choice for creating a charming look. Dimensions: 7 x 18 x 18

items.name_en: Style No.6827 🪡MCM👜 New TRACY Vintage Flap Handbag/Crossbody: Simple and sharp lines, minimalist versatile shape, creating a refined look... Classic MCM pattern elements present a unique layered visual effect. Designed for daily wear or quick trips, the lightweight shape. Laurel lock, high-profile interpretation of MCM identity, unique retro style. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap, lightweight and convenient, changing different looks. Internal details/structured and simple interior, easily accommodating daily essentials. Dimensions approx: 18x14x6cm

items.name_en: Suede [Small Dark Brown] Available
items.name_cn:
Suede [Small Dark Brown] Available
MIUMI^24FW Autumn/Winter Suede Series Bowling Bag
The hottest element this autumn and winter should be suede! Softy padded is a reinterpretation of the classic bowling bag shape. The simple design highlights the bag's diverse functionality and practical concept. The brand new suede material maximizes the autumn/winter atmosphere, exuding a super high-end retro tone. Which one is your pick from the MIUMI^ Autumn/Winter series?

items.name_en: Suede version·
items.name_cn:
Suede version·
CALYPSO_Suede Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian suede, it feels soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. The minimalist interior design allows for effortless use!
Size: 38×21×10cm
Model: 777399

specs.rawTitle:
Suede version·
CALYPSO_Suede Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian suede, it feels soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. Size: 38×21×10cm
